action.reasoning: Observation: best 0.5889 from iter11 (replay 500/task + KD beta=0.5 T=2 + consold 5eps, val~0.59, early tasks~0.46-0.5, late~0.7-0.8). Iter13 dropped to 0.4614 with very low train acc (~0.05 on task9) and val only recovering in consolidation. Curves often sparse/broken. Analysis: root cause is truncated train.py (incomplete KD/training loop after images/labels.to(device)), preventing proper learning on later tasks; previous good runs had complete code + balanced mem via meta. Replay+KD+consolidation proven effective but hyperparams+code quality sensitive. Decision: fully rewrite clean complete (non-truncated) train.py with balanced per-class memory update (using meta classes_per_task + torch.where/randperm), full KD (KLDiv on soft targets T=2 beta=0.5), cosine scheduler per-task, dense logging every 20 steps (loss+train_acc), val per epoch, best-model tracking/saving on val, mem=500/task, epochs/task=6, consold=5@lower_lr, Adam(5e-4). Keep model.py/predict.py unchanged. Train then submit_eval targeting >0.59.
